findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: Without, people can get in and run their own script- XSS
findings.evidence: Content-Security-Policy was not present in the response headers.
findings.recommendation: Add content-security-policy header that allows scripts only you actually trust.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
findings.description: Without, if someone clicks on your site, the next site will know where they came from
findings.evidence: Referrer-Policy was not present in the response headers.
findings.recommendation: Set referrer-policy to strict-origin-when-cross-origin, to not overshare

findings.title: No Cookies Observed
findings.recommendation: This may be normal. Review authenticated areas separately for session cookie security

findings.title: robots.txt Reveals Hidden Paths
findings.description: robots.txt may disclose directories or routes not intended for obvious discovery.
findings.recommendation: Do not rely on robots.txt to hide sensitive resources. Protect sensitive endpoints with authentication and authorization.

findings.title: Interesting Path Accessible
findings.description: The scanner found an accessible path that may warrant manual review.
findings.recommendation: Manually inspect the resource to determine whether it discloses sensitive functionality or information.

findings.title: Potential Error Disclosure Detected
findings.description: The application response contained backend or debugging error indicators after receiving unusual input.
findings.recommendation: Suppress detailed backend errors and implement safe exception handling.
